Package i5.cb.workbench

Class CBICommand

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.event.MouseAdapter
      • i5.cb.workbench.CBICommand
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.awt.event.ActionListener, java.awt.event.WindowListener, java.util.EventListener

    public class CBICommand
extends java.awt.event.MouseAdapter
implements java.awt.event.ActionListener, java.awt.event.WindowListener

    Class: CBICommand for CBIva
    Function: Implements ActionListener for CBIva
    See Also:
    ActionListener, CBIva

      • CBICommand

        public CBICommand​(int iAnIdentifier,
                  CBIva CBI)
        Constructor
        Parameters:
        iAnIdentifier - Identifier for the Command
        CBI - Parent CBIva

      • CBICommand

        public CBICommand​(int iIdent,
                  java.lang.String sNewLF,
                  javax.swing.JFrame jfRoot)
        Constructor
        Parameters:
        iIdent - Identifier for the Command
        sNewLF - Name of new Look and Feel
        jfRoot - Root JFrame for new Look and Feel

      • CBICommand

        public CBICommand​(int iAnIdentifier,
                  CBIvaClient CBclient)
        Constructor
        Parameters:
        iAnIdentifier - Identifier for the Command
        CBclient - a CBIvaClient

      • CBICommand

        public CBICommand​(CBIva CBI)
        alternativ Constructor
        The iIdentificator is set to iNOT_AVAILABLE. The Constructor is used to creakte a TECommand without a special Command (for WindowListener and MouseListener).
        Parameters:
        CBI - parent CBIva
        See Also:
        CBIva
